rationale: The statute references homestead exemptions generically—'all homestead exemptions applicable in each year'—so no direct statutory conflict. However, comptroller-prescribed notice forms under Subsection (d) would require rulemaking updates to reflect the increased exemption in model calculations.
quote: after subtracting all homestead exemptions applicable in each year, other than exemptions available only to disabled persons or persons 65 years of age or older or their surviving spouses, and using the same group of residences for each year
_note: Rule uses generic language accommodating any exemption amount; impact is on comptroller's prescribed forms, not the statute itself.
